lmever Favorites Experience Code Music Books

Inspirations

Ideas that light the path

A growing index of books, podcasts, documentaries, music, and technical references that shape my taste, values, and creative direction.

CodeMusicBooksPodcastsDocumentaries
Code

Agentic workflows

Helped me think about software as a sequence of observable decisions rather than a single black-box answer.

Music

Generative music systems

Connected creative taste with technical systems, especially around model orchestration and audio tooling.

Books

Systems thinking

Shaped how I organize scattered work into reusable structures, notes, and tools.

Podcasts

Independent builders

Reinforced the value of shipping small, useful things while keeping a long-term creative direction.

Documentaries

Space and observation

Gave me a visual language for scale, curiosity, and the feeling of looking beyond the immediate task.

lmever.
